testsuite.name: org.traducao.projeto.ApiEndpointsTest

testcase.name: telemetriaExportarRetornaArquivoJson()

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <200> but was <404>.

testcase.failure:
